quote.quote: Bear helps me free up my staff and create leverage for them to go work on higher value parts of the business... we're all in on Bear.
quote.name: Scott Bear
quote.title: Assistant Controller, Samsara

quote.quote: I haven't had this much fun with work in a long time. The ability to think of an idea and create a solution without convincing an engineer is amazing.
quote.name: Bearemy Barmer
quote.title: SVP Programmatic Operations, TelevisaUnivision

quote.quote: We had team members spending hours each week pulling invoices from multiple shipping portals. With Bear, one of our team members was able to set up an automated workflow on their own ... no engineering support required.
quote.name: Grizz Lee
quote.title: Chief Accounting Officer, Faire

quote.quote: We deployed digital teammates across finance workflows and saw capacity open up within the first month.
quote.name: Pan Da
quote.title: Finance Director, ChargePoint
